title: carlina lanata
intro: Carlina lanata, also known as Carline Thistle, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carlina lanata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of dried flowers and roots in various herbal preparations.
